---
title-block: false
format: revealjs
---

### Communicating Nonlinear Dynamics Across Boundaries via Interactive Simulations

**Andrew Krause (@Blindmath)**

<img class="title-logo" src="images/DurUni.png" alt="Durham University logo" loading="eager">

- ***Navigation:*** <kbd>f</kbd> fullscreen; <kbd>esc</kbd> slide deck; <kbd>→</kbd>/<kbd>←</kbd> (swiping mobile) move slides; <kbd>h</kbd> help.

---

## Join this presentation

:::  columns

:::  column
![](images/presentation_qr.png){width=65%}

[**andrewlkrause.github.io**](https://andrewlkrause.github.io){target="_blank"}
:::

::: column
![](images/qr-code.png){width=65%}

[**VisualPDE.com**](https://visualpde.com){target="_blank"}
:::

:::

<p style="margin-top:1.25rem;">***Navigation:*** <kbd>f</kbd> fullscreen; <kbd>esc</kbd> slide deck; <kbd>→</kbd>/<kbd>←</kbd> (swiping mobile) move slides; <kbd>h</kbd> help.</p>

---

### VisualPDE Example

##### Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion system

::: {.small}
$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} &= D_u\nabla^2 u + f(u, v) = \nabla^2 u + u^2 v - (a+b) u , \\
\frac{\partial v}{\partial t} &= D_v \nabla^2 v + g(u, v) = 2 \nabla^2 v-u^2 v + a (1 - v)
\end{aligned}
$$
:::

<iframe class="visualpde-embed" title="VisualPDE simulation" src="https://visualpde.com/sim?-YHwBFg46BY6QUGQwgAKJ+f53XayJhEBOOgBywWikDBYFCkRc6IeUrA4vDspA8RcxgiaDD0rrDabLYAgo24LkwtawR3m2hvnAJRLQuLZOZsMOW-rDUQZM9FEw7fXGyP0Qa1MDIBw51uW+iXJaimp4i3rVQj520Oi-PESzdfZBZLfN-" frameborder="0"></iframe>



---

## Slide 3

> More to add...

---
